description_long: This is a standard orange traffic cone with a conical body and a square base, commonly used for road safety and traffic control in urban environments. The cone is predominantly orange with two wide, white reflective stripes encircling its upper section, both of which show signs of dirt and wear. The surface of the cone is visibly scuffed and marked, indicating frequent use and exposure to outdoor conditions. The base is flat, square, and slightly wider than the cone itself, providing stability and preventing tipping. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, with no attachments or openings. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes and a square, stable base, showing visible scuffs and dirt from use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two white reflective stripes and heavy scuff marks, especially on the lower half.
description_view_1: Side view with similar features, but the scuff marks are more concentrated on the upper stripe and the base appears slightly cleaner.
description_view_2: Another side view, highlighting a large white scuff on the lower cone and a clear view of the square base.
description_view_3: Rear view with the least amount of visible scuffing, but the reflective stripes and base remain prominent.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the upper third and middle of the cone, each approximately 10 cm wide.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or openings.
attribute_base_design: The base is flat, square, and slightly wider than the cone, made of the same orange plastic, with visible scuff marks and a stable, thick structure.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible scuffs, scratches, and some fading on the reflective stripes.
